problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Combining Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
